coordinate_system: original source-image pixels to component-side board millimetres
promotion_rule: factory drawing registration establishes component identity and placement only, never electrical connectivity

owner_photos.observation: registered target-board component view shows the same 1K3 and 4K7 markings beneath stronger glare
alternate-angle target-board view directly resolves R92 as 1K3 and R99 as 4K7

r92_r99_value_evidence.promotion_basis: two target-board component photographs with different angles show matching printed values

owner_photos.observation: registered target-board view directly resolves R100/R102/R108 as 12K and the lowest R86 as 4K7
independent target-board angle shows matching 12K markings on the same top two factory-ordered bodies
independent oblique target-board angle corroborates the third R108 marking as 12K and the lowest R86 marking as 4K7

right_edge_resistor_value_evidence.promotion_basis: registered July and oblique May target-board component photographs independently read all four factory-ordered bodies: R100/R102/R108 are 12K and R86 is 4K7

owner_photo.observation: oblique target-board view directly resolves 27 on C16 and 22 on C19; no unit, decimal, tolerance, or voltage glyph is unambiguously readable on either exposed face

marking_standard.observation: the coded forms in Table 1 require a unit/decimal letter, so bare 27 and 22 do not uniquely establish capacitance

c16_c19_marking_evidence.non_promotion_basis: the target photo closes the literal visible glyphs but not whether they are complete nominal values, partial codes wrapped around the bodies, or other type/date markings

component_photo.observation: all four right-hand resistor leads terminate directly on one uninterrupted broad perimeter conductor

right_edge_resistor_common_rail_evidence.promotion_basis: the target-board component view directly exposes all four right-hand leads terminating on one uninterrupted conductor
right_edge_resistor_common_rail_evidence.non_promotion_basis: the solder-side D102.8 ground trace does not by itself prove a cross-layer join to this component-side perimeter rail

owner_photos.observation: registered July view exposes the upper C19/R100 shared landing and lower C19/R86 shared landing around the leaning capacitor body
independent oblique view separates the bent leads and corroborates C19 upper-to-R100-left and C19 lower-to-R86-left at the two common solder landings

c19_resistor_junction_evidence.promotion_basis: two target-board component angles independently show each capacitor lead and its adjacent resistor lead terminating on one physical landing

owner_photo.observation: registered target-board component view reads the C20 body marking 1Н5 after rotation and contrast enhancement

c20_value_evidence.promotion_basis: the owner-board marking is literal and the contemporary primary marking standard maps it exactly to 1500 pF

owner_photo.observation: independent target-board angle directly reads 1Н5 on the outer C22 body; D102 and the inner C20 body fix the already registered column order

c22_value_evidence.promotion_basis: the independent owner-board angle exposes the literal outer-body marking and the contemporary primary marking standard maps it exactly to 1500 pF

targets.observation: physical КР1818ВГ93 socket centre; factory drawing corrects the former D95-overlapping global placement
vertical C10 immediately right of D93; replaces the former lower-row collision with D102
vertical capacitor between D95 and D99; owner component view shows its landings but no unambiguous body
horizontal capacitor between the upper and lower IC rows

owner_evidence.precision: reviewed approximate joint centres; identity/orientation and 12.5 mm span corroboration only
owner_evidence.observation: populated grey axial body with bent leads reaching two horizontal landings

owner_evidence.precision: reviewed approximate joint centres; cross-side corroboration only
owner_evidence.observation: two backside landings on the factory-identified horizontal C16 span

targets.observation: vertical capacitor between D97 and D102; owner component view is cable-obscured
vertical capacitor immediately right of D99; upper pad1 shares R100.1 and lower pad2 shares R86.1

owner_evidence.precision: reviewed approximate joint centres; identity/orientation evidence, not the affine placement source
owner_evidence.observation: populated grey axial body with both bent leads reaching distinct landings

owner_evidence.precision: reviewed approximate joint centres; cross-side corroboration only
owner_evidence.observation: two distinct backside solder joints at the factory-identified C19 site

owner_evidence.precision: reviewed approximate joint centres; identity/orientation, 10.16 mm span, and uninterrupted component-copper endpoints
owner_evidence.observation: R92.2 joins D95.14; R92.1 joins the R99.2/D101.4 junction

owner_evidence.precision: reviewed approximate joint centres; cross-side corroboration only
owner_evidence.observation: two backside joints matching the factory-identified R92 span

owner_evidence.precision: reviewed approximate joint centres; identity/orientation, 10.16 mm span, and uninterrupted component-copper endpoints
owner_evidence.observation: R99.1 joins D101.8/GND; R99.2 joins the R92.1/D101.4 junction

owner_evidence.precision: reviewed approximate joint centres; cross-side corroboration only
owner_evidence.observation: two backside joints matching the factory-identified R99 span

targets.observation: upper resistor in the four-part row right of C19; left-hand pin1 shares C19.1 and right-hand pin2 joins the common perimeter rail
second resistor in the four-part row right of C19; right-hand pin2 joins the common perimeter rail
third resistor in the four-part row right of C19; right-hand pin2 joins the common perimeter rail
lowest resistor in the four-part row right of C19; left-hand pin1 shares C19.2 and right-hand pin2 joins the common perimeter rail
factory C20 identity/body marker at the right end of D102; registered owner photos supersede this label-centre projection with the actual 303.997,110.024 mm drill-span centre
factory C22 identity/body marker at the right end of D102; registered owner photos supersede this label-centre projection with the actual 306.537,110.024 mm drill-span centre
factory label reads C63, not C13, in the gap between D41 and D40; owner component photo shows no populated body or coherent drilled lead pair at that exact site

owner_absence_evidence.observation: the factory-defined inter-package strip is bare; no C63 body and no two-hole axial span are visible
